title: chore(deps): update typescript-eslint monorepo to v1.7.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| @​typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin | devDependencies | minor | [`1.6.0` -> `1.7.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin/1.6.0/1.7.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) |
| @​typescript-eslint/parser | devDependencies | minor | [`1.6.0` -> `1.7.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/@typescript-eslint/parser/1.6.0/1.7.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint</summary>

### [`v1.7.0`](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​170httpsgithubcomtypescript-eslinttypescript-eslintcomparev160v170-2019-04-20)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/compare/v1.6.0...v1.7.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **eslint-plugin:** indent: fix false positive on type parameters ([#​385](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/385)) ([d476f15](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/d476f15))
-   **eslint-plugin:** no-object-literal-type-assertion: fix `as const` is reported ([#​390](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/390)) ([2521b85](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/2521b85))
-   **eslint-plugin:** support BigInt in restrict-plus-operands rule ([#​344](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/344)) ([eee6d49](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/eee6d49)), closes [#​309](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/309)

##### Features

-   **eslint-plugin:** [member-accessibility] add more options ([#​322](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/322)) ([4b3d820](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/4b3d820))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add prefer-for-of rule ([#​338](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/338)) ([3e26ab6](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/3e26ab6))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add prefer-includes rule ([#​294](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/294)) ([01c4dae](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/01c4dae)), closes [#​284](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/284)
-   **eslint-plugin:** add prefer-string-starts-ends-with rule ([#​289](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/289)) ([5592a2c](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/5592a2c)), closes [#​285](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/285)
-   **eslint-plugin:** added new rule await-promise ([#​192](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/192)) ([5311342](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/5311342))
-   **eslint-plugin:** added new rule unbound-method ([#​204](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/204)) ([6718906](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/6718906))
-   **eslint-plugin:** support type assertions in no-extra-parens rule ([#​311](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/311)) ([116ca75](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/116ca75))

</details>
